plan_metadata.name: Feature Verify NLS Cache Cleared After Metadata Fetch

steps.description: Click the language selection flag button in the top-right corner of the Visual Studio Code welcome screen.
Press ctrl+shift+~ to open a new terminal in the Visual Studio Code workspace interface, with the Explorer sidebar visible and no files currently open.
Type text: 'rm -rf ~/.fx' into the integrated bash terminal at the bottom of the Visual Studio Code workspace interface.
Press the Enter key in the VS Code terminal to execute the command `rm -rf ~/.fx` in a Bash shell within the workspace interface.
Click the "Sign In" button at the top-right of the Visual Studio Code interface to initiate authentication.
@assertion "Declarative Agent", "Custom Engine Agent", "Copilot connectors" , "Teams Agents and Apps" and "Office Add-in" exist.

@assertion "Declarative Agent" indcludes the description "Create your own agent by declaring instructions". "Custom Engine Agent" includes the description "Build intelligent agent where you manage orchestration and provide your own LLM". "Copilot connectors" includes the description "Embed your organization data to make it searchable in Microsoft 365 Copilot". "Teams Agents and Apps" includes the description "Create agent, chat bot, web pages or other apps".  "Office Add-in" includes the description "Extend Office applications to interact with content in Office documents".
